metadata.notes: Initial assistant-drafted graded relevance labels for repository search evaluation. These are seed labels for review and calibration, not final human-approved ground truth.

cases.question: Where does Buoy detect GitHub repository URLs and turn them into repo-specific namespace defaults?

judgments.reason: Defines GitHubRepoSource, parse_github_repo_url, detect_source, source_id_for_url, default_out_dir, and namespace_candidate for GitHub repositories.
Consumes GitHubRepoSource after routing and reports repo-specific crawl summary metadata.
Documents expected GitHub URL parsing, routing, namespace, and invalid URL behavior in tests.

cases.question: Which code clones a public GitHub repository locally and resolves branch, commit, and metadata before indexing?

judgments.reason: Implements metadata resolution, git ls-remote fallback, shallow clone, commit SHA capture, subdir validation, and public/private error handling.
Provides the parsed GitHubRepoSource fields that acquisition uses for clone URL, requested ref, and repository subdirectory.
Exercises acquisition with local git remotes, blob/subdir failure cases, metadata fallback, and user-friendly errors.

cases.question: Where are tracked repository files selected, filtered, and rendered into the Markdown corpus for chunking?

judgments.reason: Contains list_tracked_files, repo_file_skip_reason, default exclusion rules, language detection, blob URL generation, and Markdown rendering for selected repo files.
Validates filtering, include/exclude behavior, repo subdirectories, parseable generated Markdown, and corpus chunking.
Parses the generated Markdown corpus and creates chunks after repository files have been rendered.

cases.question: How does the plan command fetch website and GitHub sources while keeping planning local with respect to Turbopuffer?

judgments.reason: Implements _run_plan, source detection, source-specific caps, local crawl/repo corpus processing, local diffing, artifact writing, and no live turbopuffer calls.
Builds deterministic plan, manifest, chunks JSONL, artifact hash, namespace, and state path without reading credentials.
Documents source fetching and the plan/apply/apply --approve boundary: planning does not read Turbopuffer credentials, load embeddings, or contact Turbopuffer.

cases.question: Where is apply preflight separated from approved live turbopuffer writes and stale deletion guardrails?

judgments.reason: Verifies saved plans locally, computes diffs, keeps preflight no-write, reads credentials only in run_approved_apply, and gates stale deletes.
Exposes apply, --approve, --delete-stale, state-root, and JSON/text behavior while routing preflight versus approved apply.
Defines the local applied-state ledger that apply preflight and approved apply use for incremental safety.
Explains the safe apply sequence and explicit stale-delete command.

cases.question: Which code propagates GitHub repo metadata into plan manifests, chunk rows, and turbopuffer row fields?

judgments.reason: Defines source_metadata on page/chunk records, GitHub metadata row fields, build_chunk_record propagation, and build_generic_site_row row output.
Writes repository frontmatter such as source_kind, repo_full_name, repo_ref, commit_sha, repo_path, language, and fetcher into generated pages.
Checks GitHub source metadata propagation into chunks and generic site rows.

cases.question: Where are Markdown docs and code files chunked for retrieval, including line-range code sections?

judgments.reason: Owns Markdown parsing, heading-aware chunking, chunk IDs, source hashes, doc_kind inference, and embedding text preparation.
Renders non-Markdown repository files as Markdown with repository path, language, and line-range fenced code sections before chunking.
Covers repository corpus rendering and confirms generated pages can be processed into chunks.

cases.question: How does Buoy retrieve from an indexed namespace using hybrid ANN plus BM25 with RRF?

judgments.reason: Builds ANN and boosted BM25 subqueries, calls turbopuffer multi_query with server-side RRF, and falls back to client-side RRF when needed.
Implements the retrieve CLI, dry-run/live gating, namespace/runtime overrides, JSON output, and rendering of hits.
Shows the user-facing retrieve command for live and dry-run indexed-site search.
Validates retrieval planning, subquery construction, client-side RRF fallback, and hit normalization behavior.

cases.question: Where is the repository search composite eval metric implemented and validated?

judgments.reason: Implements graded judgments, deterministic matching, NDCG@10, Recall@10, MRR@10, Precision@5, repo_search_score, and aggregate repo metrics.
Covers graded dataset loading, metric math, no-match behavior, duplicate handling, section matching, and invalid judgment validation.

cases.question: How does the evals command list cases safely by default and run live retrieval only when requested?

judgments.reason: Implements the evals CLI, dry-run/list default, --live gating, dataset loading, runtime config overrides, and report printing.
Provides build_dry_run_eval_report and run_live_evals, preserving no-credential dry-run behavior and live retrieval-only scoring.
Live evals rely on the retriever for credential-gated turbopuffer queries, but eval command control lives elsewhere.
Tests eval CLI dry-run behavior, dataset overrides, runtime overrides, and API-key gating for live mode.
